creator: kingdon@tuesdaystudios.com
text:
Came looking for other reports of this issue, was not disappointed.

Same issue exactly affects me.  Steps to reproduce:

1) Install FreeBSD 10.2
2) pkg install xorg
3) pkg install enlightenment
4) portmaster -Da

Build hangs during elementary at EDJ test_focus_style.edj

This also does not happen if I descend into x11-toolkits/elementary/work/elementary-1.16.3 and ./configure && gmake manually.

Hangs at test_prefs.edj building that way

I also have hald_enable and dbus_enable in /etc/rc.conf, if that might be relevant.
